name: Expansion Vehicles
description: Adds helicopters, boats, cars, car keys, towing, and vehicle features like destroyable trees and coverable netting.
overview:
Expansion Vehicles adds a wide variety of new vehicles to DayZ, bringing back iconic vehicles from the DayZ mod era.

## Helicopters

- MH-6 Little Bird
- Merlin
- UH1H
- Gyrocopter
- Quack

## Boats

- Zodiac
- Utility (RHIB)
- LHD (Aircraft Carrier)

## Cars

- Vodnik (amphibious)
- Tractor
- Bus
- UAZ (transport, cargo variants)
- Landrover

## Additional Features

- **Vanilla Vehicle Skins** — New colored variants of vanilla vehicles
- **Car Keys** — Lock and unlock vehicles
- **Towing** — Tow vehicles with other vehicles
- **Destroyable Trees** — Trees break on vehicle impact
- **Ruined Doors** — Damaged doors can fall off
- **Vehicle Netting** — Cover vehicles with camouflage netting

> For additional helicopters, check out the Arma 2 Helicopters Remastered mod.
installation: Add to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Configure vehicle spawn points and parameters.
Add vehicles to your economy files (types.xml) for persistence.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure vehicles are properly added to types.xml with correct nominal values.
Check spawn point coordinates and ensure they are on flat terrain.

useCases.title: Helicopter-Only Server
useCases.description: Disable ground vehicles and boats, enable only helicopters for a unique high-mobility experience.

useCases.title: Realistic Fuel Economy
useCases.description: Increase fuel consumption multipliers for more challenging vehicle maintenance.

quickSettings.name: HelicopterFuelMultiplier
quickSettings.description: Fuel consumption multiplier specifically for helicopters.
